note: PARSER BASELINE (HYPOTHESIS — NOT a validated model). Every ⚑ below is an UNMEASURED estimate; hand-tune + record against a real fight before trusting any number. Remove this banner only when the unit has been measured/hand-tuned. || anchor-innocent-maid (Anchor: Innocent Maid) — RL / Water / Supporter / Burst II. Kit-parse AUTHOR pass 2026-07-16 (wave 2), merging the staged baseline (overrides-baselines/) with the re-materialized parser freeze; fixes the materialized file's S1/S2 tier misalignment (it dropped the 'Once' tiers, so Distributed fired on the 1st FB and the ATK buff on the 1st FB-end — one tier early each). A HEALER-SUPPORTER: her value is team buffs + heal events, not personal damage. NO HP-scaling damage conversion anywhere in the kit — every Max HP reference (Potency of HP, the 3.04%/40.18% recoveries, the 60.19% Storage pool) is heal-magnitude/defensive; both ATK buffs are 'of the skill user's ATK' = casterAtkPct (flat add of HER Supporter ATK), never plain atkPct. Water = clean engine ×1.10 advantage (no Superior-Elemental-Code-style buff → no elemAdvantageDamagePct). || S1 block A (fullBurstEnter, all allies, escalating Once/Twice/Thrice — engine `escalating` natively models the cumulative ramp, Nth activation applies steps 1..N): [tier 1] 'Potency of HP ▲ 30.96% for 5 sec' = heal-potency modifier — NO StatKey exists and no HP amounts are modeled, so it is a value-0 attackDamagePct PLACEHOLDER kept ONLY to preserve tier ordering (Distributed must land on the 2nd FB, not the 1st); the line itself is in unmodeled.skill1. [tier 2] Distributed Damage ▲ 30.4%/10s → distributedDamagePct buff (real Damage-Up rider for any distributed-damage teammate). [tier 3] 'Stack count of debuffs ▼ 1' = cleanse — genuinely-skippable class (debuff-cleanse, partless boss applies no modeled debuffs), verbatim in unmodeled; as the LAST tier it needs no placeholder (steps 1..2 still fire correctly on 3rd+ activations). || S1 block B ('entering Full Burst while an ally from the same squad is on the battlefield'): 'Recovers 3.04% of the skill user's Max HP every 1 sec for 8 sec' → `heal` event to all allies on fullBurstEnter (hard rule 2 — event-only, no HP amount; drives cross-unit 'on recovery' consumers, Crown-style). TWO approximations, both ⚑: (a) the SAME-SQUAD gate is modeled as always-satisfied — UNVERIFIED HYPOTHESIS on gate semantics: 'same squad' plausibly means her LORE squad (characters.json carries NO squad field, so membership CANNOT be verified from our data); if so, the heal never fires in a team without one of her squadmates and this block over-fires recovery events there (no engine gate exists; impact = recovery-consumer uptime only); (b) the 8-tick cadence (8 recovery events/FB, 1/s) is collapsed to ONE heal event per FB — recovery-consumer uptime is UNDER-estimated when a consumer is present. || S2 (fullBurstEnd, all allies, escalating): [tier 1] Hit Rate ▲ 10.13%/10s → hitRatePct buff (hard rule 4 — PROVEN core-rate lift, LIVE since CONE_DELTA 2026-07-19 for AR/SMG/SG recipients via acrForHR, in-game magnitude ⚑; never dropped); [tier 2] ATK ▲ 35.02% of the skill user's ATK/10s → casterAtkPct (her main team damage buff — NOTE it starts on the 2nd FB-end, faithful to the tier ramp); [tier 3] Reload Speed ▲ 40.04%/15s → reloadSpeedPct (weapon-state = damage, hard rule 1 — team shot-count buff). || BURST (burstCast, all allies, 40s CD): 'Storage: stores excess healing received by the skill user, up to 60.19% of their Max HP, 25s' → SKIPPED to unmodeled.burst — a self overheal buffer with no engine vocabulary and NO damage consumer; deliberately NOT encoded as `shield` because Storage is not a shield in-game and a shield event would FALSELY fire `shielded` triggers on shield-synergy consumers (naga-class); re-open only if a storage-consumer kit appears. 'Recovers 40.18% of the skill user's Max HP as HP' → `heal` event to all allies (hard rule 2). 'ATK ▲ 30.09% of the skill user's ATK for 10 sec' → casterAtkPct buff. || Escalating tiers are FB-count-gated: a chain-completing team reaches tier 3 by the 3rd FB, so the big S2 buffs DO come online early in a 180s fight; a lone/enabler-less team makes ZERO FBs and none of S1/S2 ever fires (burst block still needs a completed B1→B2 chain to cast). || ⚑ FLAGS (all UNMEASURED estimates): (1) CADENCE TUPLE (ALWAYS-⚑ 1) — pullsPerSec / reloadFrames 141 / rolling-reload shipped from datamine (ammo 6, chargeFrames 60); mag-empty ≈ 8s at (60f charge + 22f bolt)/shot — plausible, NOT escalated; recipe: rounds/min + reload gap from any focus video. (2) AUTOFIRE vs 22f BOLT GAP (ALWAYS-⚑, charge weapon) — engine default (bolt gap ON) shipped; NEVER set noBoltRecovery unmeasured; ~15–20% swing on her OWN shots/burst-gen only (support — small board impact); recipe: focus video, does she re-charge immediately with no dead gap. (3) HIT-RATE → CORE-RATE MAGNITUDE (ALWAYS-⚑ 7) — hitRatePct LIVE since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) for AR/SMG/SG recipients via acrForHR (MG/SR/RL keep the flat table; anchor-innocent-maid's own RL shots gain nothing); est. in-game core-rate lift small (≈k·10.13%, k≪1); recipe: HR-buff-on vs off core fraction on a focused DPS carrier. (4) S1 HEAL CADENCE — est. 1 recovery event/FB vs true 8; recipe: count a recovery-consumer's proc rate (e.g. Crown S1 uptime) with her on team; if load-bearing, model as 8 timed events. (5) SAME-SQUAD GATE — est. always-on; gate semantics + squad membership unverified (no squad data in characters.json); recipe: run a team with NO suspected squadmate of hers, check whether the 3.04%/s regen ticks after FB entry (green heal popups); also pin which units count as her squad. (6) S1 tier-1 heal-potency + burst Storage — unmodeled defensive magnitudes; only matter if a heal-amount/overheal consumer ever exists.
caveats: skill1: 'same squad' heal gate modeled as always-satisfied — if it requires a lore-squad teammate (squad membership not in our data, unverified), recovery events over-fire in other teams (affects on-recovery consumers only)
skill1: the 8-tick regen (every 1s for 8s) now emits 8 timed recovery events (heal ticks:8) — on-recovery consumers (Crown-type) stay refreshed across the whole window (engine gap #1 fix, 2026-07-17)
skill1: tier-1 'Potency of HP' is a value-0 placeholder kept only for escalating tier order (heal potency has no engine stat)
skill2: Hit Rate ▲ 10.13% modeled as hitRatePct — LIVE since CONE_DELTA (2026-07-19) for AR/SMG/SG recipients via acrForHR; its in-game core-hit-rate lift is unmeasured
burst: healing Storage (60.19% Max HP overheal buffer) is unmodeled — defensive, no engine vocabulary; deliberately not encoded as a shield event
cadence: pullsPerSec / reloadFrames 141 / bolt-gap-vs-autofire are unverified datamine values (parser baseline)

skill1: Once: Potency of HP ▲ 30.96% for 5 sec.
Three times: Stack count of debuffs ▼ 1.
■ Activates when entering Full Burst while an ally from the same squad is on the battlefield. Affects all allies.
burst: Storage: Stores excess healing received by the skill user, up to 60.19% of their Max HP. Lasts for 25 sec.
